ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Current budget assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_expiration" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account will be unlocked after too many failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "old_budget" INTEGER /* The budget before the update */,
  "new_budget" INTEGER /* The budget after the update */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "token" TEXT /* Token used to reset the password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the password reset request was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_searches" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* The query used to search for users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
